headlines.headline: Brevon Microchips completes planned facility upgrade in Southeast Asia

headlines.headline: Grevon Biotech recalls products in digital payments line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A breakthrough in wireless connectivity suggests potential for future product innovation and competitive advantage.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
